methods.description: This method describes the setup of microcosm experiments using sandy marine sediments artificially contaminated with crude oil to study the biodegradation process.

steps.description: The available sediment was divided into four parts; one part was mixed with oil pre-dissolved in hexane, then hexane was evaporated, and the contaminated sediment was mixed with the remaining sediment under nitrogen atmosphere.
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare contaminated sediment by mixing with oil and evaporating hexane

steps.description: Setup sacrificial microcosms in 120-mL serum bottles with layers of contaminated sediment, clean sand, activated carbon, and oxygenated seawater.
steps.searchable_summary: Assemble microcosms with sediment, sand, carbon, and seawater

steps.description: Insert graphite rods vertically through the layers to create an electrochemical connection.
steps.searchable_summary: Insert graphite rods for electrochemical connection

steps.description: Incubate microcosms in the dark at 20 ± 1°C and analyze weekly for oxygen consumption and carbon dioxide evolution.
steps.searchable_summary: Incubate and analyze microcosms for gas exchange

methods.description: This method describes the analysis of oxygen and carbon dioxide concentrations in the headspace of microcosms using gas chromatography.

steps.description: Inject 50 μL of gaseous samples into a GC with a thermal conductivity detector.

methods.description: This method describes the determination of anions in the liquid phase of microcosms using ion chromatography.

steps.description: Inject a filtered sample into an IC system for anion determination.

methods.description: This method describes the quantification of total petroleum hydrocarbons in sediment samples using GC-FID after liquid-solid extraction.

steps.description: Air dry sediment samples and extract with acetone:hexane mixture using a Dionex ASE 200.
steps.searchable_summary: Extract hydrocarbons from sediment using ASE

steps.description: Evaporate extract under nitrogen flow and re-dissolve in n-heptane solution with integration markers.
Purify the heptane solution using solid phase extraction cartridges.
steps.searchable_summary: Purify extract using solid phase extraction

steps.description: Inject purified solution into GC-FID and determine TPH by summing components eluted between n-C12 and n-C40.

methods.description: This method describes the analysis of microbial communities in sediment and biofilms using CARD-FISH and DAPI staining.

steps.description: Fix sediment samples in formaldehyde and extract cells for analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: Fix and extract cells from sediment

steps.description: Filter detached cells through polycarbonate filters and store at -20°C.
Scrape biofilm from graphite rods and fix in PBS buffer with formaldehyde.
steps.searchable_summary: Collect and fix biofilm from graphite rods

steps.description: Perform CARD-FISH and DAPI staining to analyze microbial communities.
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze microbial communities using CARD-FISH and DAPI
